title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Ambuja Cements

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Ambuja Cements
jsonLd.description:
Ambuja Cements is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Ambuja Cements:
Ambuja Cements is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambuja Cements!
